raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/2023, I had unrecognized transaction on my card for {$200.00} done in XXXX. On XX/XX/2023, when I discovered that, I submitted a dispute claim and notified my credit card company ( Costco Citi credit card with Citibank ) of the issue that this is not authorized transaction and asked them to reverse and refund me the money. Then, I haven't received any communications from my credit card company after this, so I kept calling them many times to resolve it, but the credit card personnel were very unprofessional and incompetent. After few months, I received a letter from credit card company stated that they closed my dispute, so I called them again wondering why they closed it and they said that it was a mistake, and we will reopen it. Then, after few months, I was told that this dispute is transferred to the fraud dispute department that when I called, they told me that they don't have any claims for me. Every time I call the credit card company asking them for updates, letters and/or full names of people I talk to, they refuse to help me. Till now, I don't have any information about my claim, nor the money was refunded to my account.My case number is XXXX
